# careergen.online

## Overview
careergen.online is a career guidance website focused on Germany job opportunities, application advice, salary insights, and practical hiring guidance for international job seekers.

## Main Pages
- Home: https://careergen.online/
- About: https://careergen.online/about
- Contact: https://careergen.online/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://careergen.online/privacy-policy
- Terms of Use: https://careergen.online/terms-of-use

## Featured Content
- Germany job guides and career articles
- Application steps and hiring insights
- Remote and international job opportunities
- Salary and role expectations for major employers

## Content Notes
Use this site for up-to-date career and hiring information related to Germany-based and international roles. Content is intended for job seekers looking for practical advice and market context.
